description: Create a NextGen Connect channel named 'CCDA_Allergy_Parser' that polls HL7 C-CDA XML files from '/home/ga/ccda_input' every 1000ms and auto-deletes processed files. The channel must extract the patient's name (Given and Family) from 'recordTarget/patientRole/patient/name' and allergy details (substance name, reaction, and status) from the section with templateId '2.16.840.1.113883.10.20.22.2.6.1'. Write the extracted data to '/home/ga/allergy_output' in the following JSON format: { "patient": "First Last", "allergies": [ { "substance": "Name", "reaction": "Reaction", "status": "Active" } ] }. A sample file is available at '/home/ga/Documents/sample_ccda.xml'.
